comment: "I enjoyed learning about the types of common ADE and how it impacts the life of patients and can be fatal in some cases if not recognized in a timely manner. Also the importance in adhering to prescribed protocol and vigilance to ensure drug errors are preventable."
"I liked learning about the management strategies, and that is because of their permeability. I have a personal goal to come up with a nearly impermeable strategy."
"I liked the topic on incorrect dosing or drug selection. For example, giving too much or too little of an anesthetic agent, or administering the wrong medication."
"The material was presented in an easy to understand way. The navigation of the software was easy to use."
